pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 36-37 creates the file at this exact path; export_result.sh line 8 references same path
task_utils.sh line 4 (NX_BASE='https://localhost:7001'); verified against Nx Witness official documentation which confirms default REST API port is TCP 7001
task_utils.sh line 16 uses 'admin' username; verified against Nx Witness documentation confirming 'admin' is the default administrator username
task_utils.sh line 5 (NX_ADMIN_PASS='Admin1234!'); this is the custom environment password for the Nx Witness instance in this task environment

privileged_info_summary: The task imports access control events from a CSV file into Nx Witness VMS as bookmarks. The API URL is https://localhost:7001 (Nx Witness standard REST API endpoint), authenticated with username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'. The CSV file path is /home/ga/Documents/acs_exceptions.csv. The CSV data is synthetically generated at task startup with 4 test events containing realistic access control event types (Door Held Open, Access Denied, Barrier Forced, Unauthorized Entry) mapped to synthetic camera names.
